insight_a_text: Open-weights models let outside researchers find vulnerabilities sooner.
insight_b_text: Releasing model weights openly speeds up how quickly researchers surface flaws.
label: consensus

insight_a_text: Demographic shifts will pressure entitlement spending in the next decade.
insight_b_text: Over the coming decade an ageing population will strain entitlement budgets.
label: consensus

insight_a_text: AI agents will automate a large share of routine knowledge work.
insight_b_text: Much day-to-day knowledge work will be handled by autonomous AI agents.
label: consensus

insight_a_text: Publishing training code makes research results far easier to reproduce.
insight_b_text: Open training code is what actually lets others reproduce a paper's results.
label: consensus

insight_a_text: Strong AI safety regulation will slow capability research without preventing risks.
insight_b_text: Robust AI safety regulation is essential for preventing catastrophic risks.
label: no_consensus

insight_a_text: Carbon taxes are the most effective lever for emissions reduction.
insight_b_text: Cap-and-trade is the most effective lever for emissions reduction.
label: no_consensus

insight_a_text: Nuclear power is essential for decarbonising the grid.
insight_b_text: Battery storage costs have fallen dramatically since 2020.
label: no_consensus

insight_a_text: Persistent inflation justifies sustained rate hikes.
insight_b_text: Rate cuts are needed to support employment in the current cycle.
label: no_consensus

insight_a_text: Remote work boosts deep-focus productivity for individual contributors.
insight_b_text: Remote work reduces team coordination and slows shipping.
label: no_consensus

insight_a_text: Frontier model training costs keep rising each generation.
insight_b_text: Open models are closing the quality gap with frontier labs.
label: no_consensus
